text: Mom, can you please read me a bedtime
story?
>> You're not able to sleep?
>> No, I'm having trouble sleeping.
>> Okay. Once upon a time, there was a boy
named V. He was very smart. He was
getting A+ in math, A+ in bio, A+ in all
the sciences. But then he had a friend
named Ethan. And the Ethan was always
wanting to have fun. So he would tell
Vir, "Let's go ride a bicycle." And then
Vir would go and ride a bicycle out of
pressure. He himself did not want to
ride a bicycle. Then he rode the bicycle
with Ethan and they're having so much
fun. And then a big MTA bus in New York
just hit them and ran over them and
killed them.
>> What?
>> What?
>> That's what happens when you ride a
bicycle. When when your mom tells you,
"Don't ride a bicycle. Do not have fun.
That's not a relaxing bedtime story.
>> It was very relaxing for me. Now you
know not to do it.
